text:
Thanks for reaching out. We'll settle your Lakers moneyline position once the official final result is confirmed by our data feed — that's typically soon after the game ends, but can take longer if there's overtime, a protest, or any other review needed.

We can't give you a specific time, since settlement depends on when that official confirmation comes through. You'll see the result in your account as soon as it's graded.

Novig Support
